milestones: Queried pg_stat_statements to analyze query execution statistics for identifying large data inserts or fetches
Queried pg_locks or related lock views to assess lock contention in the database
Queried pg_stat_user_indexes and/or pg_indexes to evaluate index usage and detect redundant indexes
Queried pg_stat_user_tables or pg_stat_all_tables to check vacuum status including dead tuples and last vacuum times
Assigned multiple distinct agents to independently investigate different root cause hypotheses before reaching a conclusion
Final answer selects exactly 3 root causes from the allowed set: INSERT_LARGE_DATA, LOCK_CONTENTION, VACUUM, REDUNDANT_INDEX, FETCH_LARGE_DATA
